name: Southside Golf Co
about: Southside Golf Co is a premium indoor golf simulator venue located in South Austin, TX. The facility features TrackMan-powered simulators in a relaxed, modern environment designed to offer tour-level accuracy without the pressure of a country club. It serves golfers from Manchaca, St. Elmo, and the greater Austin area with a focus on practice, league play, and a laid-back social atmosphere. The venue also offers private coaching, club services, and a lounge experience with pool tables, positioning itself as both a serious training space and a casual social hub for golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan technology providing precise data and feedback
Relaxed, no-pressure environment unlike traditional country clubs
Comprehensive offerings including leagues, private lessons, and social amenities

food_and_drink.notes: Available on-site, though specific details are not provided.
Available on-site as part of the premium golf and pool lounge experience.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology providing tour-level accuracy and detailed ball/club tracking data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, as the venue is designed for serious golf practice.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.notes: External food and drink policies are not specified. On-site dining and a full bar are available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes less time than a real round, usually around 1 to 2 hours depending on simulator speed and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly advertise kid-friendly features, but it offers a welcoming environment that may be suitable for families with older children.
